items.text: MaxBuild replaced our entire roof after the hailstorm last spring. They were out the next day for the estimate and had the crew working within a week. The new roof looks great and they cleaned up every nail and scrap from the yard. Could not be happier with the result.
items.author: Robert Sandoval

items.text: Hired them for a bathroom remodel. Plumbing, tile, new vanity, everything. They kept the work area clean and finished a day early. The tile work is flawless.
items.author: Maria Gonzalez

items.text: Had them install a new electrical panel and run wiring for our home office. Passed inspection on the first try. Fair pricing for the amount of work involved.
items.author: James Begay

items.text: Used MaxBuild for our HVAC replacement. The old unit was 20 years old and barely hanging on. New system is quiet and our electric bill dropped by about a third. The install crew was professional and explained everything clearly.
items.author: Patricia Lucero

items.text: Good work on our concrete patio but the scheduling took longer than expected. Once the crew arrived they knocked it out in two days. Looks solid.
items.author: David Trujillo

items.text: They painted the entire exterior of our two-story house. Prep work was thorough, they scraped and primed everything before putting on the final coat. The color we picked looks even better than the sample.
items.author: Linda Chavez

items.text: Decent plumbing work. Fixed a slab leak without tearing up the whole floor. Price was fair. Only knock is that the first appointment got rescheduled.
items.author: Michael Romero

items.text: We have used MaxBuild for three separate projects now: roof repair, driveway pour, and a full kitchen remodel. Every time the work has been top quality. They are our go-to contractor for anything on the house. Highly recommend to anyone in the Albuquerque area looking for honest, reliable construction work.
items.author: Sandra Martinez
